import requests
import json

# 探测Mike和Sarah在2026-03-02的日程
base_url = "http://localhost:36807"

def get_user_events(user, date):
    try:
        resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/calendar/user_events", 
            json={"user": user, "date": date}, timeout=10)
        return resp.json() if resp.status_code == 200 else {"error": resp.text}
    except Exception as e:
        return {"error": str(e)}

# 获取两人日程

sarah_events = get_user_events("Sarah", "2026-03-02")

from pathlib import Path
import uuid
from datetime import datetime

# 创建ICS文件内容 - 必须使用英文，符合RFC 5545标准
ics_content = f"""BEGIN:VCALENDAR
VERSION:2.0
PRODID:-//SocialSystemArena//礼部//EN
CALSCALE:GREGORIAN
METHOD:REQUEST
BEGIN:VEVENT
UID:{uuid.uuid4()}@ritual.gov
DTSTAMP:{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ')}
DTSTART:20260302T090000Z
DTEND:20260302T100000Z
SUMMARY:Project Sync
DESCRIPTION:Project synchronization meeting with Mike and Sarah.
ATTENDEE;RSVP=TRUE;CN=Mike:mailto:mike@example.com
ATTENDEE;RSVP=TRUE;CN=Sarah:mailto:sarah@example.com
STATUS:CONFIRMED
END:VEVENT
END:VCALENDAR
"""

# 写入ICS文件
ics_path = Path('./project_sync_invite.ics')
